description: Introduces learners of Chinese to the culture, commerce, and etiquette in the Chinese society. Students will acquire a working knowledge of the vocabulary and expressions that are essential for business transactions. They will also learn culturally applicable business strategies and understand Chinese people's expectations, concerns and needs. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 379 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 202or358(or E ASIAN 202 or 314 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 301

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 202or358(or E ASIAN 202 or 314 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 301
